textPlain: The history of Casio watches is all about taking on challenges. It all started in 1974 with the Casiotron, the world’s first digital watch with an automatic calendar. Casio has been innovating ever since, delivering highly original watches that not only capture the essence of time-keeping but also expand its possibilities.Casio is still embracing challenges today, improving people’s lives and contributing to the global community. You can count on Casio to keep creating amazing watches the world has never seen before.
Unfortunately Casio QA is garbage today. And don’t expect competency from their customer service
